prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 24416→23940→27129→23630→19546 名，整体呈波动下行趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），2025 年较 2024 年大幅前移约 4084 名，创近五年最佳录取位次，反映出该校在广东物理类考生中吸引力显著提升；2021–2025 年物理类计划数分别为 236→241→240→230→241 人，2026 年计划 242 人，较 2025 年微增 1 人，扩招幅度极小（约 0.4%），对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉理工大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在 48–55 名区间（2026 年约第 54 名），属中上水平理工类院校，材料科学与工程为 A 级学科，整体实力在 211 高校中位居前列；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（南湖校区周边异常生物活动），可能对考生报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第 98（评价一般），短视频平台曝光度不高；历史投档异常记录中未见该校明显断档信号；材料科学与工程（A）、交通运输工程（A-）、机械工程（A-）为该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的材料类、交通运输类、机械类等高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向匹配，有利于维持报考热度；广东省物理类考生数从 2025 年 440208 人增至 2026 年 456000 人（+3.6%），竞争基数扩大；省控线（本科批）2025 年 436 分，近年波动不大；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，在广东为非本省招生，无本地倾斜优势；该校在广东招生规模较大（物理类约 240 人），属跨省招生中规模较大的院校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移后的回调压力、2026 年考生数增加带来的竞争加剧、声誉偏负面可能抑制报考热度，以及招生计划基本持平，预计 2026 年物理类最低录取位次较 2025 年略有后移（数字增大），预测最低位次约 19650 名，区间 19150–20150 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 24416 → 23940 → 27129 → 23630 → 19546, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend (smaller ranking numbers indicate increased competition). In 2025, the ranking significantly moved forward by about 4084 places compared to 2024, achieving the best admission ranking in the past five years, reflecting a notable increase in attractiveness to Guangdong Physics Category candidates. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for the Physics Category were 236 → 241 → 240 → 230 → 241, with the 2026 plan at 242, a slight increase of 1 person from 2025, representing a minimal expansion (about 0.4%), which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 48–55 range in recent years (approximately 54th in 2026), placing it among mid-to-upper level science and engineering institutions. Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, and its overall strength ranks among the top of 211 universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (abnormal biological activities around the Nanhu campus), which may have a certain negative impact on candidates' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average evaluation), with low exposure on short video platforms. No obvious signal of admission gaps has been seen in historical admission anomaly records. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), and Mechanical Engineering (A-) are its flagship disciplines, highly corresponding to majors such as Materials, Transportation, and Mechanical in its enrollment, strongly attracting candidates interested in these fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, matching the university's advantageous engineering fields, helping to maintain application enthusiasm. The number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong increased from 440,208 in 2025 to 456,000 in 2026 (+3.6%), expanding the competition base. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 436 points in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, and is not a local enrollment for Guangdong, so it has no local preference advantage. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Guangdong (about 240 for the Physics Category), making it a larger-scale institution among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction pressure after the significant ranking advance in 2025, the increased competition due to the rise in candidate numbers in 2026, the negative reputation that may suppress application enthusiasm, and the basically unchanged enrollment plan, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move backward (larger number) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19,650, with a range of 19,150–20,150.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is in the 19,150–20,150 range. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (e.g., Electronic Information, Mechanical, Materials), use Tier 1 majors (Communication Engineering Excellent Class, Computer Science, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Civil, Environmental, Chemical, etc.) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<19,150), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is near the lower limit (about 20,150), prioritize Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次分别为约 6636→6148→5765→6859→7711 名，2021–2023 年逐年前移（竞争加剧），2024–2025 年明显后移（竞争缓和），近两年累计后移约 1946 名，2025 年基准约 7711 名；2021–2025 年历史类计划数分别为 27→26→25→36→40 人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026 年计划 45 人，较 2025 年再增 5 人（+12.5%），扩招幅度较大，有利于缓解竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉理工大学为 211、双一流高校；软科排名约第 54 名，以理工科见长，历史类招生专业以经管法文为主，非该校核心优势领域；2026 年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件），可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度一般；未见历史类投档异常记录；该校 A 级学科（材料、交通、机械）与历史类招生专业（法学类、经济学类、工商管理类、新闻传播类等）无直接对应关系，学科优势对历史类考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学类社会热度推荐（偏热），经济学类分化观望，工商管理类明显劝退，新闻传播类明显劝退；广东省历史类考生数从 2025 年 292200 人增至 2026 年 326200 人（+11.6%），竞争基数显著扩大；省控线（本科批）2025 年 464 分，较 2024 年 428 分大幅上升，反映整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024–2025 年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年历史类考生大幅增加（+11.6%）、扩招 12.5% 部分对冲竞争压力、声誉偏负面及优势学科与文科专业匹配度低等因素，预计 2026 年历史类最低录取位次在 2025 年基准上继续小幅后移，预测最低位次约 8309 名，区间 7809–8809 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 6636→6148→5765→6859→7711, with a year-on-year forward shift from 2021 to 2023 (intensified competition), and a significant backward shift from 2024 to 2025 (eased competition), with a cumulative backward shift of about 1946 positions over the past two years, and a 2025 baseline of approximately 7711; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 27→26→25→36→40, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 45 students, an increase of 5 students (+12.5%) compared to 2025, with a relatively large expansion rate, which helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 54th in the Soft Science ranking, known for its strengths in science and engineering, with History Category enrollment majors mainly in economics, management, law, and humanities, which are not its core advantageous fields; in 2026, the reputation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), which may have a certain dampening effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity is average; no abnormal filing records for History Category have been observed; the university's A-level disciplines (materials, transportation, machinery) have no direct correspondence with History Category enrollment majors (such as law, economics, business administration, journalism and communication, etc.), and the disciplinary advantages have limited appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended (somewhat hot), Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong Province increased from 292,200 in 2025 to 326,200 in 2026 (+11.6%), significantly expanding the competition base; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) in 2025 was 464 points, a substantial increase from 428 points in 2024, reflecting intensified overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of rankings from 2024 to 2025, the significant increase in History Category candidates in 2026 (+11.6%), the 12.5% expansion partially offsetting competitive pressure, the somewhat negative reputation, and the low match between advantageous disciplines and liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 8309, and a range of 7809–8809.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is in the range of 7809–8809. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Ideological and Political Education, Business Administration) as the main force, with Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics) as a sprint, and Tier 3 (Foreign Languages and Literature) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<7809), focus on sprinting for Law; if the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (approximately 8809), prioritize Tier 3.
